description: Per-name dark-pool / off-exchange accumulation from FINRA ATS transparency (ATS+OTC weekly by symbol) vs Polygon total volume. dark_pool_pct + accel + price-classified ACCUMULATION/DISTRIBUTION. top_picks -> signal-harvester (eng:dark-pool) measure-before-trust; feeds ignition P4 dark-share. Distinct from market-level justhodl-dix.

schedule.description: Weekly Wed 14:00 UTC — FINRA ATS Tier-1 weekly data publishes ~T+2wk; weekly cadence matches source
